name: /plugin-install rejects the install when the cloned repo does not contain a plugin.yaml at its root
command: mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/no-manifest && printf 'README\n' > stub-clones/acme/no-manifest/README.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/no-manifest --gh-clone-stub stub-clones 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*plugin.yaml' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
